meaning: n.抢救财货,获救的财货,救难的奖金,海上救助,抢救,打捞vt.海上救助,抢救,打捞,营救
examples: Officials tried to salvage the situation.
They climbed up on the rock with their salvage.
That's a finding sure to find its way into ongoing fights over whether to do more salvage logging.
Diplomats meet in Geneva next week to try to salvage plans for a June peace conference.
